heading: Reward for information leading to recoveries or civil penalties

children.label: ii
children.text: the Federal Credit Union Act [ et seq.];12 U.S.C. 1751

children.label: iii
children.text: section 93(b), 164, or 481 to 485 of this title;

children.label: iv
children.text: the Federal Reserve Act [ et seq.];12 U.S.C. 221

children.label: v
children.text: the Bank Holding Company Act Amendments of 1970;

children.label: vi
children.text: the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956 [ et seq.];12 U.S.C. 1841

children.label: vii
children.text: the Home Owners’ Loan Act [ et seq.]; or12 U.S.C. 1461

children.label: viii
children.text: pursuant to a conviction for an offense referred to in subparagraph (B) of this paragraph,section 3663 of title 18

children.label: B
children.text: pursuant to a conviction for an offense under section 215, 656, 657, 1005, 1006, 1007, 1014, 1341, 1343, or 1344 of title 18 affecting a depository institution insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation, or for a conspiracy to commit such an offense; or
a forfeiture under section 981 or 982 of title 18 that arises in connection with a depository institution insured by the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation.

children.heading: Percentage limitation
children.label: b Percentage limitation
children.text: An appropriate Federal banking agency may not pay a reward under subsection (a) of more than 25 percent of the amount of the fine, penalty, restitution, or forfeiture or $100,000, whichever is less.
an officer or employee of the United States or of a State or local government who provides information described in subsection (a), obtained in the performance of official duties; or

children.label: A
children.text: deliberately causes or participates in the alleged violation of law or regulation, or

children.label: B
children.text: knowingly or recklessly provides substantially false information to such an agency or the Attorney General.

children.heading: Nonreviewability
children.label: d Nonreviewability
children.text: Any agency decision under this section is final and not reviewable by any court.
